title: Portuguese-Style Dumpling Stew
description: A hearty stew made with pillowy biscuits, portuguese sausage, and tender dumplings.
instructions: 2. In a large Dutch oven, cook the sausage over medium heat until browned.
3. Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until softened.
4. Add the vegetable broth, tofu, and dumplings to the pot.
5. Bring the stew to a boil, then cover and transfer to the preheated oven.
6. Bake for 30 minutes, or until the biscuits are golden brown and the stew is hot and bubbly.
7. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
